title: Get In Touch - Tom Hayes Labour MP Bournemouth East
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Bournemouth East
text_excerpt: Get In Touch - Tom Hayes Labour MP Bournemouth East Skip to content Home Survey News Surgeries About Me Get In Touch Get in touch I’m working hard for you and our town. I have a constituency office at 595 Christchurch Road, Boscombe, BH1 4AN. For security reasons, we’re not able to see people who do not have a pre-approved appointment. The best way to get an appointment is to contact me via email at [email protected] , or request one with this form . Other ways you can get in touch with me are: Email: [email protected] Addressed mail to: House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Phone my office: 01202 029181 Fill out my survey Plus, you can follow me on social media for regular updates on my work for Bournemouth East: Facebook Instagram Twitter TikTok Hear about my latest work for our town by getting my newsletter.
